description: You are a forensic engineer analyzing a roller coaster's dynamics. Using the reference photo at '~/Documents/GeoGebra/assets/coaster_loop.jpg', reconstruct the loop's geometry in GeoGebra as a clothoid (Euler spiral) using Fresnel integrals (cos(t²) and sin(t²)). Calibrate the scale based on a track gauge of 1.2 meters and fit the curve to the track center line. Identify the loop's height in meters with a point and label at the top. Save the project as 'coaster_reconstruction.ggb' in '~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/'.
